title: Villagolems Swapped
description: This pack inverts Villagers and Iron Golems.
body:
![VILLAGOLEMS : SWAPPED EDITION](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/92e67ba82013cbd51b8a7dd7e7dafd248ffc9b22.png)

#

> It's interesting that Villagers and Iron Golems have the exact same head models.
I wonder how it would look if their textures were inverted...

*Villagolems* is a simple ressource pack that exchanges completly the assets of Villagers/Zombie Villagers and Iron golems (textures and sounds).
Its purpose is to be cursed.

In this version, the face textures are exchanged but the size of position of the eye are edited to match the current entity.

# Dependencies

### KNOWN COMPATIBLE PACKS (with advised order for the packs)
1. [Working Armorers](https://modrinth.com/project/working-armorers)
2. [Zombie Villager Gloves](https://modrinth.com/project/zombie-villager-gloves)
3. [ Villagolems Swapped ]
4. [Sleeping Villagers](https://modrinth.com/project/sleeping-villagers)
5. [Baby Villagers](https://modrinth.com/project/baby-villagers)
6. [Unique Spawn Eggs](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/1-13-1-16-unique-spawn-eggs)

### KNOWN UNCOMPATIBLE PACKS
- Villagolems Classic
- Fresh Villagolems
- Fresh Sleeping Villagers
- Fresh Animations Extensions
- Fresh Animations
- Villager Variety
